$comment: scripts/CeruleanCity.asm CeruleanCityCoords2 — the rival ambushes you by the north bridge ((20,6)/(21,6)): he appears at (20,2), walks down to one above you, the OPP_RIVAL1 fight (party by HIS starter: 7/8/9), the take-it-easy line, the flag, the BILL speech, then the bridge-lane sidestep (x==20 right, x==21 left) and six steps south with Music_RivalAlternateStart, gone.

commands.text:
{rival}: Yo!
{player}! You're still
struggling along
back here? I'm doing great!
I caught a bunch
of strong and
smart POKéMON! Here, let me see
what you caught,
{player}!

then.text:
Hey!
Take it easy!
You won already!

{rival}: Hey,
guess what? I went to BILL's
and got him to
show me his rare
POKéMON! That added a lot
of pages to my
POKéDEX! After all, BILL's
world famous as a
POKéMANIAC! He invented the
POKéMON Storage
System on PC! Since you're using
his system, go
thank him! Well, I better
get rolling!
Smell ya later!
